routes.from: First Baptist Vidalia, 500 N Church St, Vidalia GA 30474
routes.to: Vidalia Community Center, 404 Mulberry St, Vidalia GA 30474
routes.step_summary: N Church St → left on E 4th St → right on Mulberry St. Straight shot. Curb parking on Mulberry, ADA spaces on the west side of the building.
routes.notes: For Molly moving from pantry close (12 PM) to tour close (1 PM) if she runs both.

routes.to: Vidalia Community Center, 404 Mulberry St, Vidalia GA 30474
routes.step_summary: Meadowbrook Ln → right on Sweetgum → left on E 1st St → right on Mulberry. West-door entrance is the accessible one.
routes.notes: For Molly leaving her house to open the tour.

routes.to: First Baptist Vidalia, 500 N Church St, Vidalia GA 30474
routes.step_summary: Meadowbrook Ln → right on Sweetgum → straight onto N Church St.
routes.notes: For Molly going to the pantry.

waypoints.name: Bed 1 - Azalea Bed (Molly's) - 622 Camellia Ln (Gladys's house side yard)
Bed 3 - Heirloom Vegetable Plot - 227 Live Oak Dr
Bed 4 - Rose Walk - 415 Cedar Ridge Rd
Bed 5 - Children's Flower Garden - Community Center north lawn

routes.step_summary: 5 stops in a compact 3.2 mile loop starting and ending at the Community Center. Wheelchair-friendly at every stop per accessibility check MOD-023.
routes.notes: For anyone riding with Molly between stops.
